methodology.title: How we rank
methodology.intro: How the rankings are built — every metric, and why we measure it this way.
methodology.erDesc: For static posts. The standard engagement rate — likes and comments counted equally, divided by followers — so it's directly comparable to any industry benchmark.
methodology.verDesc: For Reels. We divide by views instead of followers because a video's reach can far exceed the follower base — measuring against views reflects what was actually watched.
methodology.terDesc: Same logic as Reels, plus shares — TikTok exposes shares publicly (Instagram doesn't), and a share is a strong engagement signal, so we count it.
methodology.equalDesc: We don't weight comments or shares more than likes. A clean, equal-weight rate is what the market recognizes and can compare — no secret multipliers.
methodology.dontDesc: Saves — Instagram doesn't expose them publicly. Shares too, on Instagram (on TikTok they're public, so we count them there). We track only what's public.
methodology.windowDesc: 24 hours in each account's local timezone — a given day for a Brazilian side means BRT, for a European one means CET.

club.metaDescription: How {club} performs in the daily football engagement index — appearances, #1 spots and best rates across Instagram and TikTok.

leagues.lead: Total appearances across every report — which league shows up the most.

about.title: About
about.lead: DataFootball is the daily index of football's most-engaged posts.
about.p1: Every day we scan the biggest football accounts on Instagram and TikTok and rank their best-performing posts — clubs in the regular season, national teams during major tournaments. No opinions, no hot takes. Just what the audience actually engaged with.
about.p2: We rank by engagement rate, likes, comments, views and shares — equal weights, the same way the industry measures it. The full breakdown is on the methodology page.
about.p3: Every metric comes from public data on the post itself. We never use private or estimated numbers — only what anyone can see.
about.p4: The index is published here and every day on @datafootball__, across Instagram and TikTok.

footer.contentRights: Posts, images and videos belong to their respective clubs, national teams and creators. DataFootball is an independent project that indexes only publicly available engagement data and links back to the original posts. Not affiliated with Instagram, TikTok or any league or federation.

newsletter.title: The insights nobody else measures.
newsletter.subtitle: Every week, what football's numbers say and the media won't — engagement, underdogs, and the gap between reach and real connection. Straight to your inbox.
